code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import Login from"./componentes/login";import Dashboard from"./componentes/Dashboard";import"./App.css";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[isLogged,setIsLogged]=useState(false);const[theme,setTheme]=useState("dark");useEffect(()=>{document.documentElement.dataset.theme=theme;},[theme]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`app-shell ${theme}-theme`,children:isLogged?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Dashboard,{onLogout:()=>setIsLogged(false),theme:theme,setTheme:setTheme}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Login,{onLogin:()=>setIsLogged(true)})});}export default App;
